acquisition method: Acquisition was performed in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode...
alkylation reagent: alkylated in the dark with 60 nmol iodoacetamide (25°C, 30 min)
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the dark with 60 nmol iodoacetamide (25°C, 30 min)
cleavage agent: digestion with endoproteinase LysC (1:10 LysC weight: Cell lysate weight, overnight at 37°C; Wako, cat # 129-02541)
collision energy: Fragment ion spectra were produced via collision-induced dissociation (CID) at normalized collision energy of 35%...
fragmentation method: Fragment ion spectra were produced via collision-induced dissociation (CID)...
instrument: Samples were analyzed using a LTQ-Orbitrap Velos Pro-mass spectrometer...
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in positive ionization mode...
labeling: we performed free-label mass spectrometry analyses of M. agalactiae and M. pneumoniae...
reduction reagent: 10 μg of lysate samples were reduced with 30 nmol dithiothreitol (37°C, 60 min)...
reduction concentration: 10 μg of lysate samples were reduced with 30 nmol dithiothreitol (37°C, 60 min)...
